stan_swiata.opis: Mutual US-Iran strikes continue into day 104; Strait of Hormuz closed by Iran — sustained conflict keeps oil supply disruption risk high, directly affecting Polish energy prices. IAEA nuclear demand adds new diplomatic layer.
Ukraine continues deep strikes inside Russia (military plant hit); conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change — slowly fading into background.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17; ongoing Middle East conflict entangled with Iran situation, limited direct impact on Poland — fading to background.
Pakistan air strikes in Afghanistan continue; funerals held — regional flare-up with minimal direct impact on Poland.
Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise ties — potential shift in strategic balance affecting NATO posture, indirect relevance for Poland.
